products.title: 0R-Multiplayer Excavator Operator Job Open Source (Custom-Built Vehicle & Map)
products.fullTitle: 0R-Multiplayer Excavator Operator Job Open Source (Custom-Built Vehicle & Map) | 0r
products.excerpt: Overview This is an advanced, multiplayer Excavator Job script developed for FiveM servers. Work together with your team to complete various immersive excavation missions. Designed
products.descriptionHtml:
Overview

This is an advanced, multiplayer Excavator Job script developed for FiveM servers. Work together with your team to complete various immersive excavation missions. Designed for an easy setup—just drag and run.

Framework Compatibility

  • Fully compatible with ESX, QB-Core, and QBOX.

Custom Assets Included

  • Custom-built mission vehicles and object models have been specially designed for this script.
  • The package includes excavator trucks, JCB excavators, and custom props—all completely free.

Key Features

  • Multiplayer & Lobby System: Features a complete lobby system with team management. Invite players, assign a team leader, and manage your excavation crew.
  • Crash & Disconnect Protection: You no longer have to worry about disconnections. Mission progress is saved automatically. If you crash or exit the game, you can resume exactly where you left off upon reconnecting.
  • Dynamic Difficulty Options: Choose between Easy, Medium, or Hard. The system displays estimated rewards and team size requirements for each mission.
  • Leveling System: Earn experience points from completed tasks and progress through the ranks.
  • Interactive Mini-Games: Includes specially designed mini-games and skillbars (such as the interactive valve operation) to make the missions more realistic and engaging.
  • Job-Specific Clothing: Features a system that automatically equips construction worker outfits when players go on duty.
  • Integrated GPS & Blips: Automatically shows employer locations, vehicle spawn points, and mission destinations on the map.

Mission Modules & Gameplay

Includes 4 unique mission modules: Dirt Digging, Rock Crushing, Pipe Dirt Digging, and Rock Unloading.

Specific team tasks include:

  • Digging up dirt using the excavator and loading it onto the truck.
  • Crushing large rocks into smaller pieces using the excavator drill.
  • Collecting crushed rock pieces by hand and loading them into the truck.
  • Excavating trenches for pipe installation and placing pipes at designated locations.
  • Operating water valves using the interactive skillbar mini-game.
  • Refilling trenches by unloading dirt over the placed pipes.
  • Unloading rocks at designated disposal points using the tractor.
  • Returning all vehicles to the parking area after completing mission steps.

Note : Script Open Source,  map,vehicle, 0r_lib escrow (gift)

products.descriptionHtml:
0R Dispatch


0R-Dispatch is a modern and fully customizable dispatch system designed to enhance realism and roleplay quality for law enforcement and emergency services.

The script works with 0r_lib and is delivered with 0r_lib as escrow for security and license protection.

Documentation: Documentation Page

Framework Compatibility

  • ESX

  • QBOX

  • QBCore

Key Features

  • Real-time dispatch and alert system

  • Image-based alerts (dispatches can include screenshots)

  • Support for multiple alert boxes displayed simultaneously

  • Fully customizable alert boxes (size, position, colors, style)

  • Priority-based dispatch system

  • Incident / event type handling

  • Quick action keys for responding and menu access

  • Optimized flow with spam prevention

  • Dispatch history (Past Dispatches)

  • Map preview inside dispatch history showing incident locations

  • Search, filter, and sorting options

  • Individual logging of all dispatches

  • Clean, modern, and performance-friendly UI

  • Fully roleplay-oriented design

products.title: Frkn-Multiplayer Port Heist (Unique Missions) Open Source
products.fullTitle: Frkn-Multiplayer Port Heist (Unique Missions) Open Source | frkn
products.excerpt: FRKN Port Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script designed for those who want to experience a professional maritime operation. Move beyond simple loot
products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN Port Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script designed for those who want to experience a professional maritime operation. Move beyond simple looting and execute a calculated raid on the city's docks. Your crew must infiltrate the port, eliminate guards silently, and use heavy machinery to secure high-value cargo before the police seal the perimeter.

Thanks to the tablet, you can create teams and participate in heists with your teams.

Main Features

  • Tactical Infiltration – Enter the high-security port zone. Use stealth to take down NPCs; firing unsuppressed weapons will immediately alert the guards to your position.

  • Search & Breach – Loot fallen guards to find the security door codes. Search the office areas to locate the physical keys required for the next phase.

  • Radar Jamming – Test your skills with a custom minigame to hack the port's radar system, delaying the authorities and masking your movements.

  • Heavy Machinery Operation – Take control of the port crane to lift shipping containers from the vessels onto your trailer.

    • Dynamic Difficulty: A skill-based minigame appears during the loading process.

    • Time Pressure: If you take too long to load the containers, an automatic silent alarm notifies the police.

  • The Cargo Flight Delivery – Once loaded, transport the truck to the airport. Back your trailer into the waiting Cargo Plane to trigger a high-quality in-game cinematic as the plane takes off, marking your successful escape.

Technical Highlights

  • Stealth Mechanics: Integrated noise-detection for NPCs.

  • Cinematic Finale: Fully synced in-game cutscene for the plane departure.

  • Modern UI: All heist phases are managed via an intuitive tablet interface.

  • Highly Optimized: Clean code ensuring 0.00ms resmon usage when idle.

Compatibility

  • QBCore

  • QBOX

  • ESX

If you are looking for a complex, multi-stage heist that challenges your players' coordination and stealth skills, FRKN Port Heist is the ultimate addition to your server.

📘 View Documentation

products.fullTitle: 0R-Multiplayer Heist Robbery Pack (15 Robbery) Open Source | 0r
products.excerpt: 0R-Heist Robbery Pack (15 Robberies) One of the most comprehensive Heist & Robbery Pack scripts developed for FiveM. It includes a total of 15 different robberies. This script work
products.descriptionHtml:
0R-Heist Robbery Pack (15 Robberies) 

One of the most comprehensive Heist & Robbery Pack scripts developed for FiveM. It includes a total of 15 different robberies.


This script works with a true “drag and drop” logic and is extremely easy to install.


Thanks to this pack, you no longer need to search for individual robbery scripts; all required robberies are provided within a single script.

 

Robbery List (15)

  • Ammu-Nation Robbery

  • ATM Robbery

  • Bobcat Robbery

  • Cargo Ship Robbery

  • Fleeca Bank Robbery

  • House Robbery

  • Money Truck Robbery

  • Pacific Bank Robbery

  • Paleto Bank Robbery

  • Store Robbery

  • Train Robbery

  • Truck Robbery

  • Vangelico Robbery

  • Vehicle Theft

  • Yacht Robbery


Features

  • Map Compatibility: Fully compatible with GTA 5 default map and GABZ interiors, selectable via config

  • It features a flexible infrastructure designed to ensure easy adaptation to other custom maps. Thanks to this system, it can be integrated into custom map environments.

  • Full Framework Support: Complete compatibility with ESX / QBCore / Qbox (plug & play structure)

  • Target Optimization: Supports qb-target / ox_target with optimized interaction zones

  • Custom Minigames: Includes custom-designed, unique minigames created specifically for robbery and heist scenarios

  • High Performance: Low resource usage with optimized loops and distance-based checks

  • Multiplayer Synchronization: Full sync for NPCs, doors, loot, and mission stages

  • Easy Configuration: Rewards, cooldowns, police requirements, items, and difficulty settings are fully configurable

  • Item & Equipment Requirements: Lockpick, drill, thermite, hacking devices, etc. can be configured

  • Cooldown & Anti-Spam: Per-robbery and global cooldown systems

  • Anti-Exploit Protection: Server-side validation for rewards, progress, and triggers

  • Language Support: Multi-language ready with an easy localization structure

Note : Script Open Source, 0r_lib escrow (gift)

products.descriptionHtml:
SCRIPT OPEN SOURCE + 0R_LİB ESCROW

IT IS FULLY COMPATIBLE WITH ESX/QB/QBOX

You can disable jobs you do not want to use from config.

In this system with Multiplayer and Props, jobs will now be more different and fun together!


DON'T FORGET TO REVIEW +20 LEGAL JOBPACK


0.0 When Stationary, 0.0~0.1 Resmon Value During General Operation



🚨 Illegal Job Pack Script – Features


  • 🔁 Multiple & Solo Job Support: Players can take on illegal jobs solo or as part of a team. Each job offers different levels of challenge and reward, tailored for diverse playstyles.


  • 🛒 Black Market Online Shop: Access an in-game online black market where players can purchase mission-specific items such as jammers, fake IDs, duffle bags, and more.


  • 🚁 Realistic Drone Delivery: Purchased black market items are delivered to the player using a fully animated and immersive drone system.


  • 💬 Illegal Chat System: Private, anonymous chat channel for illegal job participants. Use it to plan, recruit, and communicate without exposing your real identity.


  • 🔧Illegal Level System: Players earn XP by completing illegal jobs and level up over time. As they progress, new and more profitable (and riskier) jobs become unlocked. This system adds a rewarding and motivating progression structure to the gameplay.


  • 😎 Anonymous Nicknames: Players can operate under an "illegal nickname" while participating in criminal jobs, keeping their real identity hidden.


👜 Bag Snatch

  • Quick and stealthy street-level theft; perfect for players.


🚗 Car Theft:

  • Steal specific high-value vehicles and deliver them to a drop-off location.


🔧 Chop Shop:

  • Bring stolen vehicles to a chop shop and disassemble them for profit.


💊 Cocaine Job:

  • Involves producing, packaging, and transporting cocaine through multiple risky phases.


💵 Corner Deal:

  • Sell drugs on the street in a dynamic environment with random NPC behavior and police risk.


💶 Counterfeit Money:

  • Craft and distribute fake money using special equipment and materials.


🌊 Illegal Diving:

  • Dive into restricted zones to retrieve smuggled packages or valuable contraband.


🧠 Fraud:

  • Hack into data centers and extract identity information to create fake profiles and documents.


🔫 Gun Smuggling:

  • Transport and distribute illegal firearms under tight surveillance.


📦 Illegal Delivery:

  • Complete shady delivery missions across the map without being detected.


💊 Meth Job:

  • Full process of meth production and distribution, including interactive chemistry steps.


💰 Black Money Laundering:

  • Convert dirty money into clean cash through layered laundering activities.


🌕 Moonshine: 

  • Craft illegal alcohol using ingredients and sell it to hidden vendors.


🥊 NPC Boxing:

  • Underground fighting for cash; place bets or fight yourself.


🌿 Weed Job:

  • Grow, harvest, and package marijuana with optional selling mini-games.


There are currently 15 jobs.Our goal is to complete the profession package to 20 professions with updates. Please provide us with detailed suggestions for illegal professions. We'll add them to the script.

  • Unknown Job ( 16/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 17/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 18/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 19/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 20/20 )

products.excerpt: 0R-Multiplayer Forklift Operator is a realistic forklift operator job script developed for FiveM servers. Players pick up cargo inside warehouses, transport it safely, and complete
products.descriptionHtml:
0R-Multiplayer Forklift Operator
is a realistic forklift operator job script developed for FiveM servers.
Players pick up cargo inside warehouses, transport it safely, and complete deliveries to earn money.
 It can be played solo or with a team, and offers a day/night shift system with dynamic job scenarios to keep the gameplay active and engaging.


Features 

  • Multiplayer Forklift Job System (solo or team-based gameplay)

  • Day / Night Shift System (Night shift provides higher earnings)

  • Progression & Earnings System  (Complete jobs, earn money, and improve efficiency)

  • Optimized Performance (low resource usage)

  • Clean UI Notifications (easy to understand & immersive)

  • Fully Configurable (Job rewards, locations, shift settings, task types)

0R-Multiplayer Trucker Job - 3 Different Missions Cargo, Container, Vehicle

Script Open Source

Map + Prop Gift (Escrow)

Add a realistic logistics experience to your server! FiveM Trucker Job Script is a multiplayer-supported job system that allows players to build a career in the transportation industry. Thanks to a specially designed MLO job center, players can choose suitable tasks and embark on large deliveries.

Features

Custom MLO Job Center
Players can start jobs by visiting a specially designed logistics depot. The dynamic and interactive environment offers a realistic work experience.

Multiplayer Support
Work alone or team up with your friends to take on larger delivery tasks.

Three Job Types
Cargo Delivery (Forklift Transport): Load cargo from warehouses onto your truck using a forklift and deliver it.
Container Transport: Take on container transport missions from the port and manage large-scale logistics operations.
Car Delivery: Safely deliver special vehicles to designated locations.

Realistic Transportation Mechanics
Use a forklift to manually load items.
Carefully place and transport containers.
Be quick and cautious with vehicle deliveries — avoid damage for full rewards.

Advanced Logistics Management
Rank up by completing jobs to unlock higher-level deliveries. Transport cargo with care to ensure maximum efficiency.

Realistic Physics & Animations
Forklift and container handling use a realistic physics engine. Custom animations and interactive loading/unloading processes provide an immersive experience.

Complete deliveries on time and earn your rewards.
Bring a long-term, competitive trucking system to your server and offer your players a brand-new career path.

products.title: Frkn-Multiplayer Cargo Plane Heist (Unique Missions) Open Source
products.fullTitle: Frkn-Multiplayer Cargo Plane Heist (Unique Missions) Open Source | frkn
products.excerpt: MULTIPLAYER CARGO PLANE HEIST FRKN Cargo Plane Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script that takes the action to the skies. Instead of simple looting,
products.descriptionHtml:
MULTIPLAYER CARGO PLANE HEIST

FRKN Cargo Plane Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script that takes the action to the skies. Instead of simple looting, your crew must board a cargo plane mid-air, bypass high-tech security, and steal luxury vehicles by dropping them out with parachutes.

Managed through a modern Tablet-based UI, players can choose from 4 different heist tiers: New Cars, Cheap Cars, Expensive Cars, and Antique Classics. This script combines stealth, hacking, and adrenaline-filled extraction mechanics into one seamless experience.

Main Features

  • 4 Distinct Heist Missions – Choose your contract via the tablet: Steal everything from cheap production cars to high-value antique collectors' items.

  • Air-to-Air Entry & Mechanics – Experience a unique flow where players must breach the plane mid-flight.

  • 3 Unique Minigames – Test your skills with custom-built hacking games:

    • Radar Jamming: Disrupt air traffic control signals.

    • Laser Disruption: Reroute power circuits to disable security grids.

    • Drone Hacking: Fly a drone into the cockpit to hack the pilot's laptop.

  • Laser Security System – Navigate through active laser beams guarding the cargo hold. Touching them triggers alarms.

  • Parachute Extraction – The highlight of the heist: Push the stolen vehicles out of the cargo ramp and parachute them down to safety.

  • Ground Delivery – Once on the ground, load the stolen vehicles onto a trailer truck for the final payout.

Compatibility

  • QBCore

  • QBOX

  • ESX

If you are looking for a cinematic, "Fast & Furious" style heist that goes beyond basic robberies, FRKN Cargo Plane Heist is the ultimate addition to your server.

📘 View Documentation

products.excerpt: FRKN MULTIPLAYER RACING V2 Competitive Multiplayer Racing & Custom Tracks for FiveM FRKN Multiplayer Racing V2 is a fully synchronized, multiplayer-focused racing system built for
products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN MULTIPLAYER RACING V2

Competitive Multiplayer Racing & Custom Tracks for FiveM

FRKN Multiplayer Racing V2 is a fully synchronized, multiplayer-focused racing system built for FiveM servers. It delivers competitive races where players can team up, compete, and enjoy a clean and immersive racing experience.

The system supports multiple race types, custom tracks, crew-based competition, and a Forza-style race line system that helps players follow the optimal racing path. Everything is designed to work smoothly in multiplayer.

Main Features

  • Multiplayer Racing System – Fully synchronized multiplayer races with fair and stable gameplay.
  • Multiple Race Types – Formula, Drift, Drag, Bike, Motor, Surf and Plane races supported.
  • Custom Tracks & Maps – Works with custom racing tracks and Formula-style circuits.
  • Race Line System (Forza Style) – Dynamic race line displayed on the road to guide players and improve race flow.
  • Crew System – Create your own crew or join others, race together and compete for weekly rewards.
  • Betting System – Place bets before races with a synchronized and secure betting system.
  • Leaderboard & Results – Accurate race results with live-updated leaderboards.
  • Open Source Structure – Easy to customize and extend for your server needs.

Compatibility

  • QBCore
  • QBOX
  • ESX

Whether you want competitive crew-based racing or large community race events, FRKN Multiplayer Racing V2 provides a clean, synchronized and enjoyable racing experience for FiveM.


 📘 View Documentation

products.excerpt: Enjoyable and rewarding tow truck missions featuring exclusive interactive NPCs and real players Fully Optimized Consumes only 0.01ms when idle. High-performance, fully server-side
products.descriptionHtml:
Enjoyable and rewarding tow truck missions featuring exclusive interactive NPCs and real players

Fully Optimized

  • Consumes only 0.01ms when idle.

  • High-performance, fully server-side focused structure for maximum stability.

Easy and Detailed Configuration

  • All settings can be easily customized through the config file.

  • Mission count, level system, vehicle classes, rewards, and framework settings are fully adjustable.

Custom-Built Towtruck Vehicle

  • A specially designed tow truck model built with high-quality details and optimized physics.

  • Realistic animations and dynamic towing mechanics for an immersive experience.

Realistic Vehicle Towing System

  • Vehicles are loaded onto the flatbed using a rope system, fully synchronized across all players.

  • Real-time physics provide smooth and natural towing movement.

Mission Modes

  • 3 Unique Mission Modes:

    • Solo Mode: Complete missions alone at your own pace.

    • Multiplayer Mode: Work together with teammates on cooperative missions.

    • Freelancer Mode: Real players can send assistance requests — tow their vehicles and earn rewards in real-time.

Framework Support

  • Fully compatible with ESX, QBCore, and QBox frameworks.

  • Supports ox_target, qb-target, and ox_lib.

  • You can switch between frameworks with a single line in the config file.

Level System

  • Thanks to the progressive level system, your earnings increase as you become more experienced in your job.

  • Each level can be configured with custom rewards, requirements, and XP progression.

Synchronization

  • All rope, vehicle, and platform interactions are fully synced for all players.

  • Delivers a lag-free and consistent multiplayer experience.

Extra Features

  • Define multiple tow zones across the map.

  • Vehicles can spawn at various locations dynamically.

  • Add unlimited levels and fully customize their properties.

  • Designed to be scalable and compatible with all types of servers.

and much more…

 Script Open Source + Custom Vehicle Gift (Escrow)

products.title: 0R-Multiplayer Builder Job Script Open Source (Custom-Built Vehicle & Map 12 Diffirent Mission)
products.fullTitle: 0R-Multiplayer Builder Job Script Open Source (Custom-Built Vehicle & Map 12 Diffirent Mission) | 0r
products.excerpt: 0Resmon Multiplayer Builder Job Script This is a multiplayer Builder Job script developed for FiveM servers. Work together with your team to complete various missions. Easy setup,
products.descriptionHtml:
0Resmon Multiplayer Builder Job Script

  • This is a multiplayer Builder Job script developed for FiveM servers.

  • Work together with your team to complete various missions.

  • Easy setup, drag and run.

  • Compatible with ESX/QB/QBOX

  • When you crash or exit the game, you can continue right from where you left off once you log back in. Your mission progress is saved automatically, so your effort will never be lost.

  • Features a simple and modern user interface.

  • Mission difficulty options (Easy, Medium, or Hard) display the estimated time required to complete each mission.

  • The map has been completely redesigned — you’ll experience improved landscapes, higher-resolution textures, and a new section showing the employer’s location.

  • Custom-built mission vehicles and object models have been specially designed. The package includes vehicles and objects with new features, all completely free.

  • Includes a brand new concrete mixer vehicle with much more realistic dynamics thanks to its detailed background setup.

  • New mission-related objects, custom wall models compatible with GTA V textures, and modern pipe and wall models make your missions more enjoyable and immersive.

  • To make the missions more realistic and detailed, there are five specially designed mini-games.

  • The new mini-games include: Valve, Weld, Nails, Voltage, and Plaster. You can find all the details in the trailer.

  • You no longer have to worry about disconnections — your mission data is automatically saved, and you can continue after reconnecting.

  • Includes 12 fully developed scenario missions, ready to play.

  • Some of the missions you can complete with your team:

    • Repair damaged bridges and road walls.

    • Complete the construction by placing walls.

    • Install objects such as pipes and fire hydrants, and reconnect the water system.

    • Secure your work areas to ensure road safety — safety first!

    • Use concrete pouring to fill in broken or missing areas.

    • Handle illegal electrical installations and wiring issues.

    • Repair broken or leaking fire hydrants.

    • Weld walls to connect the structure.

All of this is supported by special mini-games and in-game activities designed to provide a more realistic and fun construction experience.

Note : Script Open Source +  Map, Vehicle and 0r_lib Gift (Escrow)

products.title: Admin Menu - Web Admin - Early Access - Open Source
products.fullTitle: Admin Menu - Web Admin - Early Access - Open Source | s4
products.excerpt: Please only download and install the new version files. Please do not install the old s4-webadmin version. File names to be installed: s4-webadmin-beta, s4-bridge-beta, s4-stream-a
products.descriptionHtml:
Please only download and install the new version files. Please do not install the old s4-webadmin version.
File names to be installed:
s4-webadmin-beta,  s4-bridge-beta,  s4-stream-api

Even if the script is open source, the accompanying requirement scripts are escrowed.

This script is intended exclusively for server owners and head administrators. It is not designed for your moderator team. Of course, if you share the login information with developers you trust, they can use it.

This script is still in beta. Considering all the options and features it offers, any issues that may arise will be resolved as quickly as possible and made available for use.

This script is not suitable for Linux servers. We are issuing this warning because granting full access permissions on Linux servers or servers without machine access would be difficult for end users. If you still wish to use it, it is at your own risk.

In this script, we use an HTTP server in JavaScript to enable greater access and provide convenience.

There is no escrow in Lua files except for files such as lib and bridge. All JavaScript sources are open. (Even if you obtain the script as open source)

Ports 80 should not be used by any other program on your machine and should be open. You can easily open them using the “firewall_rules.bat” file we provide. (Must be run as an administrator)


Script benefits (Out-of-game)

  • Auth (Brute force protection – basic)
  • Logs (Genel log, Gunshot, Deaths)
  • Live Map 3D
  • Live Console – with vs code editor
  • Player List and actions
  • Show Player inventories – vehicles
  • Ban system (In a standalone way)
  • Resources (start-stop-restart)
  • File editor – (Edit files, Create file and folders, Delete files) – widt vsCode
  • qrConnect – (Quick connect with iPhone & Android)
  • Watch VM network

 

 

Script benefits (In-game)

  • Manager actions: Admin Tag, Player Names, Player Skeleton (self), Announce, Revive All, Delete nearby, ID Gun, Noclip, God Mode (self), Object Mode
  • Players (Quick player info, Watch live players, Player Actions)
  • Server stats (Player count, Total bank, Total cash, Server Ram, Server Cpu usage, Total Logs)
  • Banlist (Basic version)
  • Admin chat for InGame

 

All Player Action List:

  • Revive
  • Heal
  • Explode
  • Kill
  • Spawn Vehicle
  • Delete Vehicle
  • Bring To Coord
  • Give Weapon
  • Give Item
  • God Mode
  • Freeze
  • Play Sound (require xsound)
  • Show Image Url
  • Give Money
  • Set Weather
  • Set Time
  • Kick
  • Ban
  • Message, Warn, Announce
  • Revive All
  • Clear Nearby Entities
  • Set Job
  • Repair Vehicle
  • Set Fuel

New features will be added during the beta process if requested by the majority of our customers. Please feel free to share your ideas with us.

Whether you watch in-game screen broadcasts or not, they are broadcast to servers as broadcasts. This can cause fps problems for players with poor computers or those using high-end graphics packages with limited fps. This is the result of script tests on several servers between 60 and 100.


If you wish, you can leave the shared pool by setting up your own TURN/STUN server and signaling servers, and obtain more stable live streams with improved image quality. We use Cloudflare servers connected to the shared pool. This does not require any additional payment on your part.

products.excerpt: FiveM K9 & Pet Shop System | Realistic Dog Evolution + Training Parkour Key Features: • Realistic Growth System: Dogs evolve from small to large depending on their food intake and
products.descriptionHtml:
FiveM K9 & Pet Shop System | Realistic Dog Evolution + Training Parkour

Key Features:

• Realistic Growth System: Dogs evolve from small to large depending on their food intake and age progression.

• Personal Pet Menu: Manage your K9 with a dedicated menu — spawn/despawn, follow, stay, play animations, check stats (health, hunger, thirst, energy, age), and equip accessories.

• Contraband Detection: Configurable system where K9s can sniff out drugs and illegal items from players, vehicles, or objects (trash bins, etc.).

• Vehicle Search: Inspect vehicles for hidden contraband or illegal items.

• Player Search: Command your K9 to sniff and detect items directly on a player.

• Vehicle Tire Attack: K9 can attack and burst vehicle tires for advanced police scenarios.

• Realistic Leash System: Attach or remove leashes, keeping dogs close with realistic walking mechanics.

• Tennis Ball & Play Mode: Throw tennis balls for dogs to fetch and play interactive mini-games.

• Training System: Advanced training parkour with checkpoints, dummies, and skill progression (Run, Swim, Step Back, etc.).

• Item Integration: Food, water, energy snacks, revive kits, leashes, connectors, and toys all work seamlessly via your inventory.

• Stats & Needs: Hunger, thirst, energy, and health decay naturally over time, requiring proper care.

• Die Mode & Revive: Option for permanent death or revive through special items.

• Buff & Upgrade System: Purchase boosts like 15% More Damage, Faster Running, or Increased Stamina.

• Accessories & Customization: Equip vests, collars, glasses, and nameplates (per model).

• Job Restriction: Restrict usage to police, sheriff, or other specified jobs.

• Shop & Economy Integration: Buy food, toys, accessories, and upgrades directly from the in-game pet shop.


Full documentation available here  (Before using the script, be sure to review it and install the necessary things.)

products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN-BOOSTING SYSTEM (Advanced Car Boosting & Chop Shop Heist System)

Key Features:

• Multiple Contract Types: 4 unique boosting contracts (A, B, C, D) with different objectives like truck & trailer heist, vehicle crushing, repainting, and quick deliveries.

• Dynamic Gameplay: Each contract involves distinct mechanics such as GPS hacking, hotwiring, repainting, NPC guard combat, and vehicle crushing.

• GPS Hacking Device Integration: Players must disable trackers using the GPS Hacking Tablet, adding risk and immersion to each job.

• Car Crusher System: Fully functional crusher with animations and reward loot, including random item drops from destroyed vehicles.

• Guard NPCs: Configurable armed NPC guards protect higher-tier contracts, increasing difficulty and requiring strategy.

• Chop Shop & Rewards: Vehicles can be chopped into valuable materials like metal, copper, steel, or plastic.

• Progression & Reputation: Unlock higher-class contracts by building reputation and completing races.

• Dispatch & Police Balance: Customizable police requirement and dispatch alerts for balanced server economy.

• Shop System: In-game shop to purchase essential tools such as the Boosting Tablet or GPS Hacking Device.

• Advanced Config: Fully customizable system (timers, rewards, vehicles, police requirements, spawn points, and more).

• Phone Integration: Supports QB-Phone, QS-Smartphone, and LB-Phone for in-game contract notifications.  (If you want it to be compatible with your own phones, we will be happy to help.)

• Full Compatibility: Works with OX Inventory, QB-Core, and ESX/QBOX setups.

✨ With FRKN-BOOSTING SYSTEM, car theft isn’t just stealing a vehicle — it’s a full heist experience with multiple paths, risks, and rewards.

products.descriptionHtml:
CINEMATIC PREVIEW


KIBRA SMARTPAD TABLET SYSTEM


Kibra SmartPad is an all-in-one, immersive tablet experience for your FiveM server. 


Kibra SmartPad Features;


  • All-in-One RP Control Panel
    Includes Police MDT, EMS App, Mail App, Billing App, Notes, Settings, and more in a single, unified tablet system.
  • Advanced Police MDT System
    Supports player and vehicle lookups, issuing fines, creating criminal records, managing weapon licenses, and accessing dispatch and announcement panels.
  • EMS Integration
    View downed players, track their real-time locations on the map, and respond to dispatch calls efficiently.
  • Camera App
    Players can take high-quality in-game photos and record videos directly from the tablet. Perfect for immersive RP moments and documentation.
  • Gallery App
    Organize photos into albums, view past shots, and even share media with other players using AirDrop-style transfers. Designed to feel just like a real tablet gallery.
  • Billing App
    Send invoices to players, monitor unpaid bills, and access complete billing history.
  • Mail App
    In-game email system for immersive character-to-character communication.
  • Modern and Customizable Interface
    Draggable and resizable windows, light/dark mode support, theme customization, and a personalized lock screen experience.
  • Map App
    Players can share their locations with each other through a built-in map interface.
  • News App
    Weazel News reporters and journalists can publish stories and updates directly from the app.
  • DOJ App
    A full courtroom system for attorneys and prosecutors to manage cases and legal processes within roleplay.
  • Realistic Charging System

    Tablets may run out of power. Power banks can be used to recharge them.

  • MetaData-Enabled Gun License ID




Coming Soon
Several new applications are planned and will be delivered through future updates, including:

  • Housing App 

  • Apartments App

  • Additional utilities and roleplay-enhancing features

0r_lib is required for the script to run. 0r_lib is sent to your keymaster account with FiveM Escrow support for free with your purchase.

products.descriptionHtml:
TACTICAL ILLEGAL DIVING (s4-bridge escrowed) Open Source

 

Dive into Adventure: Introducing 0Resmon's New, Highly Anticipated Diving Script!

Get ready to immerse your players in an unforgettable underwater experience with our brand-new diving script! This isn't just any script; it features three distinct missions, each with its own unique theme, designed to keep your players hooked and deeply engaged on your server.

Our script masterfully integrates five essential in-game items, making their effective use crucial for success. This strategic requirement not only elevates the challenge but also creates more opportunities for player interaction and extended playtime as they navigate the thrilling depths. Prepare for an adventure that will truly bind your community!

Essential Gear for Deep Dives

Our diving script features specialized items crucial for deep-sea exploration. Items like the adjustable headlight, sonar device, and anchor are vital for successful missions. You have full control over how players acquire them: list them in your in-game store, make them available in illegal shops, or even allow players to obtain them through illicit means.

Mastering these items gives players a significant advantage, leading to greater rewards. Beyond just cash, deep dives can yield illegal items, precious metals, and valuable jewels. The best part? You completely customize all the rewards!

Key Features:

  • Three Unique Missions: Each with a distinct theme for maximum player engagement.
  • 5 Essential Items: Requires players to effectively use specific items, increasing challenge and replayability.
  • Fully Customizable: Missions and configurations are completely editable.
  • Editable Language Files: Seamless localization with included, editable language files.
  • Plug-and-Play: Easy setup and execution once minimum requirements are met.
  • Lore & Roleplay Friendly: Designed to seamlessly integrate into your server's narrative.
  • Optimized Performance: Resource-friendly and secure, ensuring minimal server impact.
  • Customizable Rewards: You determine all the rewards, from cash to illegal items, precious metals, and jewels.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase. This script is a single-player mission.

products.excerpt: FLIPPER HACKER TOOL SYSTEM Open Source I'd like to introduce you to "S4-Resflip," a revolutionary hacker system for your FiveM servers. This system will unlock a brand-new world of
products.descriptionHtml:
FLIPPER HACKER TOOL SYSTEM   Open Source

 

I'd like to introduce you to "S4-Resflip," a revolutionary hacker system for your FiveM servers. This system will unlock a brand-new world of illicit activities for your players, extending playtime and boosting player count on your server!

With S4-Resflip, your players will:

  • Develop their skills by learning special abilities to execute hack actions. This adds depth to the game and encourages players to level up and earn in-game currency through mini-games.
  • Perform a variety of illicit actions, such as printing fake police IDs and infiltrating city and LSPD databases.
  • Cut city power, remotely control other players' vehicles, or disable their engines.
  • Monitor and hack security cameras, and mislead the police by sending fake dispatches.
  • Open/lock car and house doors, and execute parking meter, ATM, and cash register robberies.
  • Learn other players' locations, and perform hacks via Wi-Fi networks and device signals.
  • Jam GPS, radio, and call signals, tamper with car trunks, and install vehicle acceleration software.
  • Customize numerous settings, including ability durations, earned levels and coin amounts, and the money that can be withdrawn from ATMs.
  • Work seamlessly with other scripts (e.g., ID card script for fake ID printing, Kebra dispatch script for sending fake dispatches).
  • Enrich game dynamics with the thrilling possibility of encountering the police.
  • Discover hackable targets by scanning for Wi-Fi and devices while exploring the city.
  • Affect radio signals by impacting not just a specific device, but an entire area or even the whole city.

S4-Resflip will enhance your players' role-playing experience and create unforgettable moments on your server! Don't miss out on this unique system!

The document for the script is being written now...

If you don't want to adapt, you can buy 0r_idcard and kibra-dispatch from our store.

All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN CAMERA SYSTEM – Real-Time Surveillance & CCTV for FiveM

FRKN Camera is a fully immersive, advanced CCTV system built for FiveM roleplay servers. It operates entirely through target-based interaction — no commands, no items, just pure realism.

Main Features

Live Audio Monitoring – Listen to player conversations directly from surveillance cameras.

Smart Alarm Triggers – Automatically detects armed or masked players and triggers alerts.

Signal Jammer Support – Cameras can be disabled by players using a skill-based minigame.

Multiple Camera Modes – Includes normal view, night vision, thermal, and tracking mode.

Group Detection – Alerts when multiple players gather near a camera.

ADVANCED ILLEGAL METH  CARAVAN - MOTOVAN Open Source

Attention This script contains only these promised features, except for the items below, this script has no other promises;

- Cooking meth in a caravan

- Cannot move if there is someone inside the caravan

- To cook meth in a caravan you need water, electricity and items

- The script uses only Drawtext for now, if there is a lot of demand in the future, target update can be realized. But for now it only uses Drawtext.

- Script does not require an extra dependent garage system or cannot be adapted to another garage system

- The script is delivered with item images and you should set them yourself

- Script does not use sql, it uses json to reduce your server's sql usage.

- Script does not contain different features other than the video.

It does not contain different features other than config settings.

- It may require adaptation for your extra scripts.

- Blip has exports for your system.

 

Take your operations on the road with our fully customizable Meth Lab Caravan! This isn’t just any regular mobile setup – it’s an advanced, feature-packed vehicle designed to enhance your production while keeping you under the radar.

Cook, Crack, and Package – All in One Place

Transform your caravan into a fully functional meth lab where you can cook, crack, and package high-quality product. However, this process is not as simple as it seems – you’ll need to manage essential resources like energy and water to keep your operations running smoothly.

Customizable Features for Maximum Efficiency

Set yourself apart from other caravans by upgrading your mobile lab with a range of premium features. Each enhancement not only adds convenience but also provides additional benefits to your operation.

🔹 CCTV System – Keep an eye on your surroundings and stay one step ahead of potential threats.
🔹 Noise Pollution Prevention Filter – Reduce the sound of your operations to avoid attracting unwanted attention.
🔹 Soundproofing System – Additional sound insulation to ensure your activities remain undetected.
🔹 Extra Stashes – Increase storage capacity for your materials and finished product.
🔹 Solar Panel – Maintain a sustainable power source and reduce dependency on external energy supplies.

Each of these features provides tangible benefits, whether it’s enhancing security, improving efficiency, or reducing operational risks.

Stay Alert, Stay Smart

Cooking meth in this caravan isn’t just about following simple steps – it requires careful management. You must monitor your energy and water levels and replenish them regularly to avoid disruptions. Additionally, be cautious of noise levels! If the decibels get too high, law enforcement might catch wind of your illicit activities.

Are you ready to take your mobile meth lab to the next level? Invest in the best caravan setup and dominate the market while staying ahead of the game!

products.title: HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP
products.fullTitle: HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP | s4
products.excerpt: HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP Open Source S4 Hot Pursuit is a script designed specifically for chases, aimed at trapping pursuers. The features ar
products.descriptionHtml:
HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP Open Source

S4 Hot Pursuit is a script designed specifically for chases, aimed at trapping pursuers. The features are item-based and are only activated inside vehicles. Since the script is centered around chases, the actions performed will only affect nearby players, and any players outside the effect range (or those who move out of it) will have the traps and effects automatically removed.

Features and Promises:

  • Spilling oil from the vehicle trunk during chases.
  • Throwing an oil bottle from inside the vehicle.
  • Deploying a retractable spike trap from inside the vehicle.
  • Throwing an object similar to a fire extinguisher to obstruct vision!

The spilled oil makes vehicles uncontrollable by lubricating their tires, causing them to skid. You can configure which vehicle classes will be affected by the spilled oil through the config file.

  • For example, you can prevent off-road vehicles from being affected by the oil.

You can disable progress notifications.
You can activate or deactivate markers.
The effect radius can be adjusted according to the limits set by FiveM.
 The intensity and frequency of oil spills can be configured.

Traps:

  • Oil Tank Trap: By using the oil tank trap item, you can spill a large amount of oil from the vehicle’s trunk and turn the chase in your favor.
  • Retractable Spike Strip Trap: When the spike strip trap item is used, it first throws a small paper bag on the ground. The mechanism inside the bag is triggered upon contact with the ground, activating the spike trap.
  • Oil Bottle Trap: When the oil bottle trap item is used, the player throws the bottle out of the window. When the bottle hits the ground and breaks, it creates an oil puddle at the impact site. Any vehicle that enters the puddle loses control.
  • Mini Fire Extinguisher Vision Trap: When the mini fire extinguisher vision trap item is used, it throws a small fire extinguisher behind the vehicle. Upon impact with the ground, the extinguisher explodes, releasing gas that obstructs vision. If a vehicle is nearby or directly hits the trap, there is a chance that the vehicle will explode as well!

 


All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

products.descriptionHtml:
ADVANCED VEHICLESHOP + 3D PRICE TEXT Open Source

s4-vehicleshop gives you an amazing experience, you can think of it as a package rather than a vehicleshop. It comes with extra scripts such as 3D-Text Scripts, Props and Maps. 



Here are the benefits that s4-vehicleshop will bring to your server;

  • Create and customise multiple galleries
  •  Job assignment for galleries 
  •  Impressive and clean design
  •  Test Drive, Colour change and Show Room Feature
  •  Vehicle price with 3D Text
  •  Impressive and Futuristic background map
  •  Extra camera light adjustment
  •  Adjustable vehicle features



All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

  • Even if you buy the script open source, the required ‘s4-props, s4-text3d, qua_critical_char’ scripts are delivered ESCROWED! These are map files and requirement files do not support customisation!

products.descriptionHtml:
This script its a STANDALONE no need a framework!

Preview: PREVIEW

This script allows you to create regions on the map. For example, an area you specify as permanently snowy and permanently night. 

  • Sync game time to real time We have set this time as Los Angeles city. You can set this setting for other cities and time zones via config.
  • Time and Weather adjustable regions on the map
  • Create a region with the region creation tool /area_tool
  • Chilling and sweating properties Using this feature is a bit complicated, you will need to define clothes and weather conditions in the config. We can't do this out-of-the-box because Each server's outfit package is not fixed and outfit numbers may vary. You can turn this feature off if you don't want it.
  • Freeze Time, FreezeWeather & Blackout Features
  • Clean UI

It does not work with other weather or time sync scripts and creates incompatibility. The script ui is opened with the /time command. If it doesn't open, make sure the script name is "0r-easytime"! If you want to open a support ticket, open it under the category "s4".

MANAGEABLE AND HIGHLY DETAILED MOTEL  SYSTEM

The codes of the file named "0r_motels" sold in this package are clear. And it is accessible and fixable.

Multiple room types are available.

The Server Owner can create a Hotel or Apartment wherever and however he wishes.

You can add garages to motels. There is a right to park 1 car per room.

Players can rent a room for as long as they want. The rental agreement is terminated when the room rental period is exceeded.

Players can extend their current rental period.

Players can write a review about the rooms they rent and rate them by giving stars.

The Motel or Apartment owner has a boss menu. And it can do anything from this menu. (Not as much as admin)

Two types of rooms can be created: with teleport or with MLO.)

Players can open motel rooms via lockpick.

Players can give each other room keys or take them back.

Automatic and manual payment options are available for billing.

In Motel, players can increase their stash weight in exchange for money as much as the server owner allows.

Metadata System is available. You can assign room keys to a unique item.

Players can change the wall colors of their Double Plus type rooms.

The owner of the motel or apartment can change the garage colors of the motel.

Players can shower in motel rooms.

The motel owner may discount room rates.



APARTMENT SYSTEM

The Config.Apartment option in the script only works with esx_multicharacter and qb-multicharacter. If you are using a different multicharacter, the documentation includes instructions on what to do. The responsibility in this matter belongs to you.

products.excerpt: previewhttps://youtu.be/7jEiUfROmPEscript-open5305269script-escrow5305267 -UI features: Adaptive design for varying aspect ratios and resolutions. When a new squad gets created, de
products.descriptionHtml:
previewhttps://youtu.be/7jEiUfROmPE
script-open5305269
script-escrow5305267

-UI features: Adaptive design for varying aspect ratios and resolutions. When a new squad gets created, deleted or when a player joins values will change real-time.  

-General features:

 The resource consumption for both client and server is 0.00ms.

 After joining a squad the client resource consumption will remain 0.00ms.

 During join and leave activities, resource consumption will spike to 0.01ms on server side.(this spike is temporary and afterwards it'll go down)

 Maximum allowed player count for a squad can be changed through config.lua.

-Squad features: 

Every squad has its own unique icon/logo. 

Squads can be made private or public 

The menu will change to squad specific menu after joining one or creating.  

After rallying the squad a in-game overlay will pop up on top left side of the screen.(Which shows the health, armor, name and the picture of members) 

Squad leader can send invites to available players via "/invite [id]" command, these invites will appear on the recipients menu.(Invites will expire after 1 minute) 

Squad leader can kick members from squad. 

If squad leader leaves the squad, leadership will be given to a random member. 

If there's only one member in the squad and that member leaves, the squad will automatically be disbanded. 

Squad members can see each other on the map.  

Squad members will see health, armor values and names on top of their squad mates.

 Friendly fire is off within the squad.

Players who get dismissed from their squad will immediately lose their status as a squad member, thus removing them from minimap and hiding their health/armor values. 

Note: If you use steam_webApiKey, each player's own steam profile photo will appear in the squad, but if you don't use steam_webApiKey, every player's profile photo in the squad will be the same.

products.excerpt: SYNC AUDIO, FAVORITED SONGS, SPEAKERS & BOOMBOXES SPATIAL [3D] AUDIO, 3 EFFECT User-Friendly UI Menu NO LAG, NO NUI CRASH, NO SERVER CRASH&TIMEOUT Music Everywhere! Play songs anyw
products.descriptionHtml:
SYNC AUDIO, FAVORITED SONGS, SPEAKERS & BOOMBOXES

SPATIAL [3D] AUDIO, 3 EFFECT

User-Friendly UI Menu

NO LAG, NO NUI CRASH, NO SERVER CRASH&TIMEOUT

📻 Music Everywhere!

Play songs anywhere, in your car or with boomboxes!

🎧 Spatial (3D) Audio

Players experience sounds from their actual locations, with a sense of distance and direction.

🎯 Audio Effects

Muffled Sound: Songs sound muffled and distant when outside the vehicle, creating a realistic outdoor feel. 

Realistic Echo: Dynamic reverb is applied to corridors, rooms, and enclosed spaces to create an echo effect appropriate for the space.

Interior Muffle: Speakers or boomboxes inside buildings and structures sound muffled and distant from outside, creating a realistic outdoor feeling.

🔊 Boomboxes

Enjoy yourself with 6 different Boombox models! (4 Portable, 2 Stationary)

Place the Boombox wherever you like

Carry your boomboxes in your hands or on your back!

🪄 User-Friendly Menu (UI - User Interface)

Manage your music enjoyment with a compact and simple interface! View and play your recently played songs! Save your favorite songs and play them whenever you want!

🔗 YouTube Integration - Song Upload Speed

Play any song you want on YouTube! (Using the video ID)

All YouTube operations are performed entirely by another server, so it does not cause issues like NUI (CEF) crashes!

The loading speed for a song that has not been played before varies between 1 and 3 seconds. (This time was tested with a song with a maximum length of 5 minutes.)

Clients load songs in 1ms to 7ms, providing very fast performance.

⚙️ Performance

NUI (CEF): The JavaScript Instance allocates an average of 100KB of RAM for a new song. Thanks to the Garbage Collector and optimizations, usage decreases over time.

Client Side: 0.00 when idle, but varies between 0.00 and 0.01ms when 2 speaker/boombox is rendered.

Server Side: 0.00 during idle time, but varies between 0.00 and 0.03ms during a new song loading process. Under load, it performs at an average of 0.00 to 0.03ms

♻️ Sync & OneSync Compatibility

Music is synchronized among all players, so everyone hears the same song at the same time!

Music synchronization is maintained in cases such as reconnecting to the server, dying, or changing regions!

Don't forget to check the Documentation page for development and more detailed content!

Supporting 7 Languages / You can add more - Currently, ar, cz, ro, it, fr, de, and tr language support is available. You can add more from the locale files.

products.fullTitle: 0R-Multiplayer Excavator Operator Job Escrow (Custom-Built Vehicle & Map) | 0r
products.excerpt: Overview This is an advanced, multiplayer Excavator Job script developed for FiveM servers. Work together with your team to complete various immersive excavation missions. Designed
products.descriptionHtml:
Overview

This is an advanced, multiplayer Excavator Job script developed for FiveM servers. Work together with your team to complete various immersive excavation missions. Designed for an easy setup—just drag and run.

Framework Compatibility

  • Fully compatible with ESX, QB-Core, and QBOX.

Custom Assets Included

  • Custom-built mission vehicles and object models have been specially designed for this script.
  • The package includes excavator trucks, JCB excavators, and custom props—all completely free.

Key Features

  • Multiplayer & Lobby System: Features a complete lobby system with team management. Invite players, assign a team leader, and manage your excavation crew.
  • Crash & Disconnect Protection: You no longer have to worry about disconnections. Mission progress is saved automatically. If you crash or exit the game, you can resume exactly where you left off upon reconnecting.
  • Dynamic Difficulty Options: Choose between Easy, Medium, or Hard. The system displays estimated rewards and team size requirements for each mission.
  • Leveling System: Earn experience points from completed tasks and progress through the ranks.
  • Interactive Mini-Games: Includes specially designed mini-games and skillbars (such as the interactive valve operation) to make the missions more realistic and engaging.
  • Job-Specific Clothing: Features a system that automatically equips construction worker outfits when players go on duty.
  • Integrated GPS & Blips: Automatically shows employer locations, vehicle spawn points, and mission destinations on the map.

Mission Modules & Gameplay

Includes 4 unique mission modules: Dirt Digging, Rock Crushing, Pipe Dirt Digging, and Rock Unloading.

Specific team tasks include:

  • Digging up dirt using the excavator and loading it onto the truck.
  • Crushing large rocks into smaller pieces using the excavator drill.
  • Collecting crushed rock pieces by hand and loading them into the truck.
  • Excavating trenches for pipe installation and placing pipes at designated locations.
  • Operating water valves using the interactive skillbar mini-game.
  • Refilling trenches by unloading dirt over the placed pipes.
  • Unloading rocks at designated disposal points using the tractor.
  • Returning all vehicles to the parking area after completing mission steps.

products.title: Frkn-Multiplayer Port Heist (Unique Missions) Escrow
products.fullTitle: Frkn-Multiplayer Port Heist (Unique Missions) Escrow | frkn
products.excerpt: FRKN Port Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script designed for those who want to experience a professional maritime operation. Move beyond simple loot
products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN Port Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script designed for those who want to experience a professional maritime operation. Move beyond simple looting and execute a calculated raid on the city's docks. Your crew must infiltrate the port, eliminate guards silently, and use heavy machinery to secure high-value cargo before the police seal the perimeter.

Thanks to the tablet, you can create teams and participate in heists with your teams.

Main Features

  • Tactical Infiltration – Enter the high-security port zone. Use stealth to take down NPCs; firing unsuppressed weapons will immediately alert the guards to your position.

  • Search & Breach – Loot fallen guards to find the security door codes. Search the office areas to locate the physical keys required for the next phase.

  • Radar Jamming – Test your skills with a custom minigame to hack the port's radar system, delaying the authorities and masking your movements.

  • Heavy Machinery Operation – Take control of the port crane to lift shipping containers from the vessels onto your trailer.

    • Dynamic Difficulty: A skill-based minigame appears during the loading process.

    • Time Pressure: If you take too long to load the containers, an automatic silent alarm notifies the police.

  • The Cargo Flight Delivery – Once loaded, transport the truck to the airport. Back your trailer into the waiting Cargo Plane to trigger a high-quality in-game cinematic as the plane takes off, marking your successful escape.

Technical Highlights

  • Stealth Mechanics: Integrated noise-detection for NPCs.

  • Cinematic Finale: Fully synced in-game cutscene for the plane departure.

  • Modern UI: All heist phases are managed via an intuitive tablet interface.

  • Highly Optimized: Clean code ensuring 0.00ms resmon usage when idle.

Compatibility

  • QBCore

  • QBOX

  • ESX

If you are looking for a complex, multi-stage heist that challenges your players' coordination and stealth skills, FRKN Port Heist is the ultimate addition to your server.

📘 View Documentation

mask, neck, arms, t-shirt, vest, badge, torso2, bag, pants, shoes, hat, glasses, ear, watch, bracelet

🚨 Illegal Job Pack Script – Features


  • 🔁 Multiple & Solo Job Support: Players can take on illegal jobs solo or as part of a team. Each job offers different levels of challenge and reward, tailored for diverse playstyles.


  • 🛒 Black Market Online Shop: Access an in-game online black market where players can purchase mission-specific items such as jammers, fake IDs, duffle bags, and more.


  • 🚁 Realistic Drone Delivery: Purchased black market items are delivered to the player using a fully animated and immersive drone system.


  • 💬 Illegal Chat System: Private, anonymous chat channel for illegal job participants. Use it to plan, recruit, and communicate without exposing your real identity.


  • 🔧Illegal Level System: Players earn XP by completing illegal jobs and level up over time. As they progress, new and more profitable (and riskier) jobs become unlocked. This system adds a rewarding and motivating progression structure to the gameplay.


  • 😎 Anonymous Nicknames: Players can operate under an "illegal nickname" while participating in criminal jobs, keeping their real identity hidden.


👜 Bag Snatch

  • Quick and stealthy street-level theft; perfect for players.


🚗 Car Theft:

🔧 Chop Shop:

💊 Cocaine Job:

  • Involves producing, packaging, and transporting cocaine through multiple risky phases.


💵 Corner Deal:

  • Sell drugs on the street in a dynamic environment with random NPC behavior and police risk.

🌊 Illegal Diving:

🧠 Fraud:

💰 Black Money Laundering:

🌕 Moonshine:

🥊 NPC Boxing:

  • Underground fighting for cash; place bets or fight yourself.


🌿 Weed Job:

products.excerpt: MULTIPLAYER CARGO PLANE HEIST FRKN Cargo Plane Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script that takes the action to the skies. Instead of simple looting,
products.descriptionHtml:
MULTIPLAYER CARGO PLANE HEIST 

FRKN Cargo Plane Heist is a high-stakes, fully synchronized multiplayer robbery script that takes the action to the skies. Instead of simple looting, your crew must board a cargo plane mid-air, bypass high-tech security, and steal luxury vehicles by dropping them out with parachutes.

Managed through a modern Tablet-based UI, players can choose from 4 different heist tiers: New Cars, Cheap Cars, Expensive Cars, and Antique Classics. This script combines stealth, hacking, and adrenaline-filled extraction mechanics into one seamless experience.

Main Features

  • 4 Distinct Heist Missions – Choose your contract via the tablet: Steal everything from cheap production cars to high-value antique collectors' items.

  • Air-to-Air Entry & Mechanics – Experience a unique flow where players must breach the plane mid-flight.

  • 3 Unique Minigames – Test your skills with custom-built hacking games:

    • Radar Jamming: Disrupt air traffic control signals.

    • Laser Disruption: Reroute power circuits to disable security grids.

    • Drone Hacking: Fly a drone into the cockpit to hack the pilot's laptop.

  • Laser Security System – Navigate through active laser beams guarding the cargo hold. Touching them triggers alarms.

  • Parachute Extraction – The highlight of the heist: Push the stolen vehicles out of the cargo ramp and parachute them down to safety.

  • Ground Delivery – Once on the ground, load the stolen vehicles onto a trailer truck for the final payout.

Compatibility

  • QBCore

  • QBOX

  • ESX

If you are looking for a cinematic, "Fast & Furious" style heist that goes beyond basic robberies, FRKN Cargo Plane Heist is the ultimate addition to your server.

📘 View Documentation

FRKN MULTIPLAYER RACING V2

Competitive Multiplayer Racing & Custom Tracks for FiveM

FRKN Multiplayer Racing V2 is a fully synchronized, multiplayer-focused racing system built for FiveM servers. It delivers competitive races where players can team up, compete, and enjoy a clean and immersive racing experience.

The system supports multiple race types, custom tracks, crew-based competition, and a Forza-style race line system that helps players follow the optimal racing path. Everything is designed to work smoothly in multiplayer.

Main Features

  • Multiplayer Racing System – Fully synchronized multiplayer races with fair and stable gameplay.

  • Custom Tracks & Maps – Works with custom racing tracks and Formula-style circuits.

  • Betting System – Place bets before races with a synchronized and secure betting system.

  • Open Source Structure – Easy to customize and extend for your server needs.

Compatibility

  • QBOX

Whether you want competitive crew-based racing or large community race events, FRKN Multiplayer Racing V2 provides a clean, synchronized and enjoyable racing experience for FiveM.

products.excerpt: Multiplayer / Solo Hunting XP Level Based ( Multiplier ), Group System, Missions and More.. ESX, QBCORE, AND QBOX SUPPORTED Fully Optimized! - Preview Hunting Zones: - There are di
products.descriptionHtml:
Multiplayer / Solo Hunting

XP Level Based ( Multiplier ), Group System, Missions and More..

ESX, QBCORE, AND QBOX SUPPORTED

Fully Optimized! - Preview


🍂 Hunting Zones:

- There are different hunting areas available

- Hunting areas have different animals and rarity values! 

- You can adjust the spawn time and spawn rate of animals within the area!

📜 Missions:

- You can accept mission and earn extra money and XP

- You can create custom missions based on level.

🔢 Levels:

- The desired amount of levels can be set.

- A multiplier specific to levels can be set. This multiplier affects the XP gained when tanning animal hides and the money earned when selling animal parts. You gain an additional amount equal to the multiplier.

- The XP required for levels and the default level can be adjusted.

🫎 Animals:

- Animals specific to each area can be placed

- The XP and animal parts (items) awarded when an animal's skin is removed can be customized based on the animal.

- The option to use knife types such as WEAPON_KNIFE for skinning animals is available in the config.

- Animations and progress bars used for skinning animals are available in the config.

🚗 Vehicles:

- When the job is started, the vehicle model specified in Config will spawn. 

- The vehiclekey and fuel scripts for the vehicle will work with automatic integration.

📦 Hunting Items ( Starter Items ):

- You can configure the necessary weapons, ammunition, and other items for hunting from the table available in the Config.

- Items given in situations such as leaving the area or exiting the server will be automatically deleted. It is not possible for me to take the items out of the hunting area.

💼 Job Integration / Work with Job:

- You can specify whether the job is required via the configuration.

- It means that if the job can be done without requiring a specific profession, anyone can use this profession without changing their job and without requiring a specific job.

🧑‍🧒‍🧒 Group:

- The group limit can be set in Config. By default, groups of 4 people are available.

- Players in the group can see each other on the map. This can be disabled in the Config.

- When group tasks are completed, the reward can be divided and distributed among the group members. This feature can be disabled in Config.

🔖 Admin Commands:

- /givexp <id> <amount>: You can give the user hunting XP in this format.

- /setxp <id> <amount>: You can set the user's hunting XP to a fixed value.

- /setlevel <id> <level>: You can set the user's hunting level using this command. 

🛡 Protection from cheaters:

- All items and events such as giving money are completely protected from cheaters.

- Some cheaters have been prevented from rounding up animals and illegally killing them all at once.

🔩  Resmon Values:

Client Side: Default 0.00 If you are not in any hunting area.  If you are in a hunting area 0.01 (Constant) 

Server Side: It works with a default value of 0.00 . When the areas are completely filled with animals and actively hunted, it varies between 0.00 and 0.02. The server was tested under load with 400 real players. 

Don't forget to check the Documentation page for development and more detailed content!

Supporting 7 Languages / You can add more - Currently, ar, cz, ro, it, fr, de, and tr language support is available. You can add more from the locale files.

When you crash or exit the game, you can continue right from where you left off once you log back in. Your mission progress is saved automatically, so your effort will never be lost.
Features a simple and modern user interface.
Mission difficulty options (Easy, Medium, or Hard) display the estimated time required to complete each mission.
The map has been completely redesigned — you’ll experience improved landscapes, higher-resolution textures, and a new section showing the employer’s location.
Custom-built mission vehicles and object models have been specially designed. The package includes vehicles and objects with new features, all completely free.
Includes a brand new concrete mixer vehicle with much more realistic dynamics thanks to its detailed background setup.
New mission-related objects, custom wall models compatible with GTA V textures, and modern pipe and wall models make your missions more enjoyable and immersive.
To make the missions more realistic and detailed, there are five specially designed mini-games.
The new mini-games include: Valve, Weld, Nails, Voltage, and Plaster. You can find all the details in the trailer.
You no longer have to worry about disconnections — your mission data is automatically saved, and you can continue after reconnecting.
Includes 12 fully developed scenario missions, ready to play.

Some of the missions you can complete with your team:Repair damaged bridges and road walls.Complete the construction by placing walls.Install objects such as pipes and fire hydrants, and reconnect the water system.Secure your work areas to ensure road safety — safety first!Use concrete pouring to fill in broken or missing areas.Handle illegal electrical installations and wiring issues.Repair broken or leaking fire hydrants.Weld walls to connect the structure.
Repair damaged bridges and road walls.
Complete the construction by placing walls.
Install objects such as pipes and fire hydrants, and reconnect the water system.

Use concrete pouring to fill in broken or missing areas.

products.descriptionHtml:
🚓 Frkn Police Job PACK | All-in-One Police System for FiveM


Frkn Police Job is the ultimate police package for serious FiveM roleplay servers. Featuring a fully modular, UI-based law enforcement system, this script turns your department into a fully functional, professional force — with everything from dispatch and evidence to radio, fingerprint, boss tools, GPS, and more.


Many files are provided as open source, so you can organize everything as you wish. 

  • All UI files are open source (html , css , js)
  • editable.lua
  • shared/*lua , 
  • client/core.lua
  • server/core.lua
  • locales/*lua

All files that will be useful to you are provided as open source. You can easily access everything in the script that is editable.


🔑 Key Features

  • 🖥 Full UI-Based System
    Every system is built with a sleek, responsive interface — no commands or old menus. Pure immersive interaction.

  • ⚙️ Modular Architecture
    Enable or disable any feature individually via config. Only use what fits your server.

  • 🧭 Advanced Dispatch System

    • Heatmap-based live map surveillance

    • Incident creation, permission assignment, officer tracking

    • Built-in chat, filters, active event logs

  • 📡 Radio & GPS Integration

    • Connect to frequency-based GPS or radio channels

    • Panic button, channel colors, vehicle tracking, and GPS range settings

    • Supports both LEO & custom channels

  • 🧬 Evidence & Forensics System

    • Scan DNA or fingerprint evidence

    • Match analysis with confidence percentage

    • Export reports as PDF, attach to criminal cases, or print directly

  • 🎥 Bodycam System

    • Record scenes with timestamp and location

    • Save & view video logs of officer activities

    • Modern interface like real-life cams

  • 👮 Duty, Badge, and Interaction Systems

    • On/off duty system

    • Badge menu for job info display

    • Interaction menu for player actions with permission control

  • 💼 Boss Menu

    • Hire/fire staff, promote/demote, assign permissions

    • Full cash register with fast deposit/withdraw buttons

    • Rank-based access to view reports or manage evidence

  • 🚔 Vehicle & Helicopter UI

    • Dedicated panels for police vehicle and heli spawns

    • Inventory access, vehicle control, and cleanup tools

  • 🧤 Prop System

    • Place props on scenes for investigation or training

    • Add, move, delete — fully synced with visuals

📁 Included Systems (All Fully UI-Based)

  • Armory

  • Badge Menu

  • Duty Manager

  • Interaction Menu

  • Prop System

  • GPS

  • Evidence Locker

  • Vehicle / Helicopter

  • Fingerprint

  • Bodycam

  • Clothing

  • Report System

  • Boss Menu

  • Evidence

  • Radar

  • Dispatch

  • Radio

⚙️ Extra

  • ✅ Fully compatible with QB-Core, ESX, and QBOX

  • ✅ Supports both qb-target , ox_target , qb-drawtext , ox_lib

  • ✅ Includes English and Turkish language files

  • ✅ Ready-to-use modern UI

📘 View documentation

products.title: Admin Menu - Web Admin - Early Access - Escrow
products.fullTitle: Admin Menu - Web Admin - Early Access - Escrow | s4
products.excerpt: Please only download and install the new version files. Please do not install the old s4-webadmin version. File names to be installed: s4-webadmin-beta, s4-bridge-beta, s4-stream-a
products.descriptionHtml:
Please only download and install the new version files. Please do not install the old s4-webadmin version.
File names to be installed:
s4-webadmin-beta,  s4-bridge-beta,  s4-stream-api

Even if the script is open source, the accompanying requirement scripts are escrowed.

This script is intended exclusively for server owners and head administrators. It is not designed for your moderator team. Of course, if you share the login information with developers you trust, they can use it.

This script is still in beta. Considering all the options and features it offers, any issues that may arise will be resolved as quickly as possible and made available for use.

This script is not suitable for Linux servers. We are issuing this warning because granting full access permissions on Linux servers or servers without machine access would be difficult for end users. If you still wish to use it, it is at your own risk.

In this script, we use an HTTP server in JavaScript to enable greater access and provide convenience.

There is no escrow in Lua files except for files such as lib and bridge. All JavaScript sources are open. (Even if you obtain the script as open source)

Ports 80 should not be used by any other program on your machine and should be open. You can easily open them using the “firewall_rules.bat” file we provide. (Must be run as an administrator)


Script benefits (Out-of-game)

  • Auth (Brute force protection – basic)
  • Logs (Genel log, Gunshot, Deaths)
  • Live Map 3D
  • Live Console – with vs code editor
  • Player List and actions
  • Show Player inventories – vehicles
  • Ban system (In a standalone way)
  • Resources (start-stop-restart)
  • File editor – (Edit files, Create file and folders, Delete files) – widt vsCode
  • qrConnect – (Quick connect with iPhone & Android)
  • Watch VM network

 

 

Script benefits (In-game)

  • Manager actions: Admin Tag, Player Names, Player Skeleton (self), Announce, Revive All, Delete nearby, ID Gun, Noclip, God Mode (self), Object Mode
  • Players (Quick player info, Watch live players, Player Actions)
  • Server stats (Player count, Total bank, Total cash, Server Ram, Server Cpu usage, Total Logs)
  • Banlist (Basic version)
  • Admin chat for InGame

 

All Player Action List:

  • Revive
  • Heal
  • Explode
  • Kill
  • Spawn Vehicle
  • Delete Vehicle
  • Bring To Coord
  • Give Weapon
  • Give Item
  • God Mode
  • Freeze
  • Play Sound (require xsound)
  • Show Image Url
  • Give Money
  • Set Weather
  • Set Time
  • Kick
  • Ban
  • Message, Warn, Announce
  • Revive All
  • Clear Nearby Entities
  • Set Job
  • Repair Vehicle
  • Set Fuel

New features will be added during the beta process if requested by the majority of our customers. Please feel free to share your ideas with us.

Whether you watch in-game screen broadcasts or not, they are broadcast to servers as broadcasts. This can cause fps problems for players with poor computers or those using high-end graphics packages with limited fps. This is the result of script tests on several servers between 60 and 100.


If you wish, you can leave the shared pool by setting up your own TURN/STUN server and signaling servers, and obtain more stable live streams with improved image quality. We use Cloudflare servers connected to the shared pool. This does not require any additional payment on your part.

products.excerpt: FiveM K9 & Pet Shop System | Realistic Dog Evolution + Training Parkour Key Features: • Realistic Growth System: Dogs evolve from small to large depending on their food intake and
products.descriptionHtml:
FiveM K9 & Pet Shop System | Realistic Dog Evolution + Training Parkour

Key Features:

• Realistic Growth System: Dogs evolve from small to large depending on their food intake and age progression.

• Personal Pet Menu: Manage your K9 with a dedicated menu — spawn/despawn, follow, stay, play animations, check stats (health, hunger, thirst, energy, age), and equip accessories.

• Contraband Detection: Configurable system where K9s can sniff out drugs and illegal items from players, vehicles, or objects (trash bins, etc.).

• Vehicle Search: Inspect vehicles for hidden contraband or illegal items.

• Player Search: Command your K9 to sniff and detect items directly on a player.

• Vehicle Tire Attack: K9 can attack and burst vehicle tires for advanced police scenarios.

• Realistic Leash System: Attach or remove leashes, keeping dogs close with realistic walking mechanics.

• Tennis Ball & Play Mode: Throw tennis balls for dogs to fetch and play interactive mini-games.

• Training System: Advanced training parkour with checkpoints, dummies, and skill progression (Run, Swim, Step Back, etc.).

• Item Integration: Food, water, energy snacks, revive kits, leashes, connectors, and toys all work seamlessly via your inventory.

• Stats & Needs: Hunger, thirst, energy, and health decay naturally over time, requiring proper care.

• Die Mode & Revive: Option for permanent death or revive through special items.

• Buff & Upgrade System: Purchase boosts like 15% More Damage, Faster Running, or Increased Stamina.

• Accessories & Customization: Equip vests, collars, glasses, and nameplates (per model).

• Job Restriction: Restrict usage to police, sheriff, or other specified jobs.

• Shop & Economy Integration: Buy food, toys, accessories, and upgrades directly from the in-game pet shop.


Full documentation available here  (Before using the script, be sure to review it and install the necessary things.)
