products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN-BOOSTING SYSTEM (Advanced Car Boosting & Chop Shop Heist System)

Key Features:

• Multiple Contract Types: 4 unique boosting contracts (A, B, C, D) with different objectives like truck & trailer heist, vehicle crushing, repainting, and quick deliveries.

• Dynamic Gameplay: Each contract involves distinct mechanics such as GPS hacking, hotwiring, repainting, NPC guard combat, and vehicle crushing.

• GPS Hacking Device Integration: Players must disable trackers using the GPS Hacking Tablet, adding risk and immersion to each job.

• Car Crusher System: Fully functional crusher with animations and reward loot, including random item drops from destroyed vehicles.

• Guard NPCs: Configurable armed NPC guards protect higher-tier contracts, increasing difficulty and requiring strategy.

• Chop Shop & Rewards: Vehicles can be chopped into valuable materials like metal, copper, steel, or plastic.

• Progression & Reputation: Unlock higher-class contracts by building reputation and completing races.

• Dispatch & Police Balance: Customizable police requirement and dispatch alerts for balanced server economy.

• Shop System: In-game shop to purchase essential tools such as the Boosting Tablet or GPS Hacking Device.

• Advanced Config: Fully customizable system (timers, rewards, vehicles, police requirements, spawn points, and more).

• Phone Integration: Supports QB-Phone, QS-Smartphone, and LB-Phone for in-game contract notifications.  (If you want it to be compatible with your own phones, we will be happy to help.)

• Full Compatibility: Works with OX Inventory, QB-Core, and ESX/QBOX setups.

✨ With FRKN-BOOSTING SYSTEM, car theft isn’t just stealing a vehicle — it’s a full heist experience with multiple paths, risks, and rewards.

products.title: KIBRA SMARTPAD - MDT EMS APPS TABLET SYSTEM + 0R DISPATCH + (0R Lib Escrow)
products.fullTitle: KIBRA SMARTPAD - MDT EMS APPS TABLET SYSTEM + 0R DISPATCH + (0R Lib Escrow) | kibra
products.excerpt: CINEMATIC PREVIEW KIBRA SMARTPAD TABLET SYSTEM Kibra SmartPad is an all-in-one, immersive tablet experience for your FiveM server. Kibra SmartPad Features; All-in-One RP Control Pa
products.descriptionHtml:
CINEMATIC PREVIEW


KIBRA SMARTPAD TABLET SYSTEM


Kibra SmartPad is an all-in-one, immersive tablet experience for your FiveM server. 


Kibra SmartPad Features;


  • All-in-One RP Control Panel
    Includes Police MDT, EMS App, Mail App, Billing App, Notes, Settings, and more in a single, unified tablet system.
  • Advanced Police MDT System
    Supports player and vehicle lookups, issuing fines, creating criminal records, managing weapon licenses, and accessing dispatch and announcement panels.
  • EMS Integration
    View downed players, track their real-time locations on the map, and respond to dispatch calls efficiently.
  • Camera App
    Players can take high-quality in-game photos and record videos directly from the tablet. Perfect for immersive RP moments and documentation.
  • Gallery App
    Organize photos into albums, view past shots, and even share media with other players using AirDrop-style transfers. Designed to feel just like a real tablet gallery.
  • Billing App
    Send invoices to players, monitor unpaid bills, and access complete billing history.
  • Mail App
    In-game email system for immersive character-to-character communication.
  • Modern and Customizable Interface
    Draggable and resizable windows, light/dark mode support, theme customization, and a personalized lock screen experience.
  • Map App
    Players can share their locations with each other through a built-in map interface.
  • News App
    Weazel News reporters and journalists can publish stories and updates directly from the app.
  • DOJ App
    A full courtroom system for attorneys and prosecutors to manage cases and legal processes within roleplay.
  • Realistic Charging System

    Tablets may run out of power. Power banks can be used to recharge them.

  • MetaData-Enabled Gun License ID




Coming Soon
Several new applications are planned and will be delivered through future updates, including:

  • Housing App 

  • Apartments App

  • Additional utilities and roleplay-enhancing features

0r_lib is required for the script to run. 0r_lib is sent to your keymaster account with FiveM Escrow support for free with your purchase.

TACTICAL ILLEGAL DIVING (s4-bridge escrowed) Escrow

 

Dive into Adventure: Introducing 0Resmon's New, Highly Anticipated Diving Script!

Get ready to immerse your players in an unforgettable underwater experience with our brand-new diving script! This isn't just any script; it features three distinct missions, each with its own unique theme, designed to keep your players hooked and deeply engaged on your server.

Our script masterfully integrates five essential in-game items, making their effective use crucial for success. This strategic requirement not only elevates the challenge but also creates more opportunities for player interaction and extended playtime as they navigate the thrilling depths. Prepare for an adventure that will truly bind your community!

Essential Gear for Deep Dives

Our diving script features specialized items crucial for deep-sea exploration. Items like the adjustable headlight, sonar device, and anchor are vital for successful missions. You have full control over how players acquire them: list them in your in-game store, make them available in illegal shops, or even allow players to obtain them through illicit means.

Mastering these items gives players a significant advantage, leading to greater rewards. Beyond just cash, deep dives can yield illegal items, precious metals, and valuable jewels. The best part? You completely customize all the rewards!

Key Features:

  • Three Unique Missions: Each with a distinct theme for maximum player engagement.
  • 5 Essential Items: Requires players to effectively use specific items, increasing challenge and replayability.
  • Fully Customizable: Missions and configurations are completely editable.
  • Editable Language Files: Seamless localization with included, editable language files.
  • Plug-and-Play: Easy setup and execution once minimum requirements are met.
  • Lore & Roleplay Friendly: Designed to seamlessly integrate into your server's narrative.
  • Optimized Performance: Resource-friendly and secure, ensuring minimal server impact.
  • Customizable Rewards: You determine all the rewards, from cash to illegal items, precious metals, and jewels.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase. This script is a single-player mission.

products.excerpt: FLIPPER HACKER TOOL SYSTEM Escrow I'd like to introduce you to "S4-Resflip," a revolutionary hacker system for your FiveM servers. This system will unlock a brand-new world of illi
products.descriptionHtml:
FLIPPER HACKER TOOL SYSTEM  Escrow

 

I'd like to introduce you to "S4-Resflip," a revolutionary hacker system for your FiveM servers. This system will unlock a brand-new world of illicit activities for your players, extending playtime and boosting player count on your server!

With S4-Resflip, your players will:

  • Develop their skills by learning special abilities to execute hack actions. This adds depth to the game and encourages players to level up and earn in-game currency through mini-games.
  • Perform a variety of illicit actions, such as printing fake police IDs and infiltrating city and LSPD databases.
  • Cut city power, remotely control other players' vehicles, or disable their engines.
  • Monitor and hack security cameras, and mislead the police by sending fake dispatches.
  • Open/lock car and house doors, and execute parking meter, ATM, and cash register robberies.
  • Learn other players' locations, and perform hacks via Wi-Fi networks and device signals.
  • Jam GPS, radio, and call signals, tamper with car trunks, and install vehicle acceleration software.
  • Customize numerous settings, including ability durations, earned levels and coin amounts, and the money that can be withdrawn from ATMs.
  • Work seamlessly with other scripts (e.g., ID card script for fake ID printing, Kebra dispatch script for sending fake dispatches).
  • Enrich game dynamics with the thrilling possibility of encountering the police.
  • Discover hackable targets by scanning for Wi-Fi and devices while exploring the city.
  • Affect radio signals by impacting not just a specific device, but an entire area or even the whole city.

S4-Resflip will enhance your players' role-playing experience and create unforgettable moments on your server! Don't miss out on this unique system!

The document for the script is being written now...

If you don't want to adapt, you can buy 0r_idcard and kibra-dispatch from our store.

All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN CAMERA SYSTEM – Real-Time Surveillance & CCTV for FiveM

FRKN Camera is a fully immersive, advanced CCTV system built for FiveM roleplay servers. It operates entirely through target-based interaction — no commands, no items, just pure realism.

Main Features

Live Audio Monitoring – Listen to player conversations directly from surveillance cameras.

Smart Alarm Triggers – Automatically detects armed or masked players and triggers alerts.

Signal Jammer Support – Cameras can be disabled by players using a skill-based minigame.

Multiple Camera Modes – Includes normal view, night vision, thermal, and tracking mode.

Group Detection – Alerts when multiple players gather near a camera.

Target-Based Access – Compatible with qb-target and ox_target.

Interactive Camera UI – Switch between cameras, zoom in/out, and rotate — all with smooth NUI integration.

Configurable Settings – Customize everything from camera rotation limits to UI interaction distance.

Highlights

No commands or items required. Setup your own camera network and start monitoring in real time.

Players can break cameras by shooting them or disabling them using the jammer system.

Each camera has configurable detection logic, grouping response, and alarm trigger behavior.

Package Includes

Optimized server/client code

Custom NUI interface

Full configuration support

Compatible with QBCore, ESX, or custom frameworks

Full documentation available here

products.descriptionHtml:
Multiplayer Drug Laboratory  - Drug Business Cinematic Video Click Me

Multiplayer Drug Laboratory - Drug Business Ingame Video Click Me



0R MANAGEABLE MULTIPLAYER DRUG LABORATORY - DRUG BUSINESS | ESCROW

Get ready for the most incredible adventure of your life with the cutting-edge drug business system! You will love building, developing and monetising different production lines across three fantastic laboratories !

FEATURES

  • Buy an illegal warehouse and set up your business
  • You can always change the name, blip color and visibility of your business
  • Get partners in your business and run it together
  • You can transfer your business to your partners
  • 3 different operation types: Weed, Cocaine, Meth. You can develop your business and set up different production lines
  • It's a living system that works, even if you're not in the game, the system will work.
  • You have to meet the needs of the business, a realistic experience with payments for raw materials, gas, water, electricity
  • Improve your business and see the difference. Interiors change and function live
  • Hire new workers and keep your business running
  • Buy a security system and protect against thieves
  • Monitor your business at all times with security cameras, keep an eye on the outside
  • You can add a realistic experience by turning your business lights on and off
  • You can dissolve and close your business at any time
  • Fulfill raw material tasks and collect raw materials and load them into your business
  • Do all the necessary steps and start production
  • As long as you have the raw material, the system will continue to produce
  • Produce to reach required levels and activate other production lines
  • Sell the packages you produce and make dirty money.
  • Sell the pacts you produce with the task of selling them and collect the money in your safe
  • Create a money wash zone in your business to clean up black money
  • Your employees will clean the money for you and put it in your safe
  • The cops can raid your business and arrest you !
  • If your security system is not activated, thieves can break in !
  • If you don't take care of your business, if you don't pay wages, the workers will stop working!

products.descriptionHtml:
ADVANCED ILLEGAL METH  CARAVAN - MOTOVAN Escrow

Attention This script contains only these promised features, except for the items below, this script has no other promises;

- Cooking meth in a caravan

- Cannot move if there is someone inside the caravan

- To cook meth in a caravan you need water, electricity and items

- The script uses only Drawtext for now, if there is a lot of demand in the future, target update can be realized. But for now it only uses Drawtext.

- Script does not require an extra dependent garage system or cannot be adapted to another garage system

- The script is delivered with item images and you should set them yourself

- Script does not use sql, it uses json to reduce your server's sql usage.

- Script does not contain different features other than the video.

It does not contain different features other than config settings.

- It may require adaptation for your extra scripts.

- Blip has exports for your system.

 

Take your operations on the road with our fully customizable Meth Lab Caravan! This isn’t just any regular mobile setup – it’s an advanced, feature-packed vehicle designed to enhance your production while keeping you under the radar.

Cook, Crack, and Package – All in One Place

Transform your caravan into a fully functional meth lab where you can cook, crack, and package high-quality product. However, this process is not as simple as it seems – you’ll need to manage essential resources like energy and water to keep your operations running smoothly.

Customizable Features for Maximum Efficiency

Set yourself apart from other caravans by upgrading your mobile lab with a range of premium features. Each enhancement not only adds convenience but also provides additional benefits to your operation.

🔹 CCTV System – Keep an eye on your surroundings and stay one step ahead of potential threats.
🔹 Noise Pollution Prevention Filter – Reduce the sound of your operations to avoid attracting unwanted attention.
🔹 Soundproofing System – Additional sound insulation to ensure your activities remain undetected.
🔹 Extra Stashes – Increase storage capacity for your materials and finished product.
🔹 Solar Panel – Maintain a sustainable power source and reduce dependency on external energy supplies.

Each of these features provides tangible benefits, whether it’s enhancing security, improving efficiency, or reducing operational risks.

Stay Alert, Stay Smart

Cooking meth in this caravan isn’t just about following simple steps – it requires careful management. You must monitor your energy and water levels and replenish them regularly to avoid disruptions. Additionally, be cautious of noise levels! If the decibels get too high, law enforcement might catch wind of your illicit activities.

Are you ready to take your mobile meth lab to the next level? Invest in the best caravan setup and dominate the market while staying ahead of the game!


All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

  • Even if you buy the script open source, the required ‘s4-props, s4-text3d, qua_critical_char’ scripts are delivered ESCROWED! These are map files and requirement files do not support customisation!

products.descriptionHtml:
FRKN-TuningChip - Advanced Vehicle Tuning System


Take your vehicle customization to the next level with the FRKN-TuningChip. Offering in-depth control over every aspect of your vehicle's handling and performance, this tuning system is designed for car enthusiasts who demand precision.

✨ Key Features


🔧 Dyno System:

  • Measure and monitor the vehicle's power and performance metrics to optimize tuning settings effectively.


🔄 Comprehensive Handling Adjustments:

  • Fine-tune a wide range of vehicle attributes, including suspension, traction, brake force, and drive bias.
  • Advanced adjustments for chassis dynamics like roll center and traction levels.
  • Suspension control options for height, stiffness, and damping.


💾 USB Tuning Save & Export:

  • Save custom vehicle tuning profiles to a USB item.
  • Transfer saved profiles and apply them to other vehicles seamlessly.
  • USB management with clear identification and easy export/import functionality.


🔍 Police Tuning Control:

  • Law enforcement can use a dedicated tablet to inspect and verify vehicle modifications and tuning levels.


⚠️ Safety Warning System:

  • Alerts users when accessing advanced settings, ensuring they are aware of the impact of critical changes.


🏋️ Preset Modes:

  • Choose from preset modes like Sport, Drift, Normal, and Drag, each offering optimized performance for specific driving conditions.
  • Switch between custom and preset modes for flexibility.


🔄 User-Friendly Interface:

  • Clean and intuitive menu layout with easy navigation across tuning sections (Chassis, Engine, Transmission, Brakes, Suspension, Wheel).
  • Visual adjustment bars and numerical value control for precise tuning.


Unleash the full potential of your vehicles and dominate the streets with the FRKN-TuningChip.


Optimize Your Ride Today!

products.title: HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP
products.fullTitle: HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP | s4
products.excerpt: HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP Escrow S4 Hot Pursuit is a script designed specifically for chases, aimed at trapping pursuers. The features are ite
products.descriptionHtml:
HOT PURSUIT FOR FIVEM - SPILL OIL - NAIL TRAP - THE VISION TRAP Escrow

S4 Hot Pursuit is a script designed specifically for chases, aimed at trapping pursuers. The features are item-based and are only activated inside vehicles. Since the script is centered around chases, the actions performed will only affect nearby players, and any players outside the effect range (or those who move out of it) will have the traps and effects automatically removed.

Features and Promises:

  • Spilling oil from the vehicle trunk during chases.
  • Throwing an oil bottle from inside the vehicle.
  • Deploying a retractable spike trap from inside the vehicle.
  • Throwing an object similar to a fire extinguisher to obstruct vision!

The spilled oil makes vehicles uncontrollable by lubricating their tires, causing them to skid. You can configure which vehicle classes will be affected by the spilled oil through the config file.

  • For example, you can prevent off-road vehicles from being affected by the oil.

You can disable progress notifications.
You can activate or deactivate markers.
The effect radius can be adjusted according to the limits set by FiveM.
 The intensity and frequency of oil spills can be configured.

Traps:

  • Oil Tank Trap: By using the oil tank trap item, you can spill a large amount of oil from the vehicle’s trunk and turn the chase in your favor.
  • Retractable Spike Strip Trap: When the spike strip trap item is used, it first throws a small paper bag on the ground. The mechanism inside the bag is triggered upon contact with the ground, activating the spike trap.
  • Oil Bottle Trap: When the oil bottle trap item is used, the player throws the bottle out of the window. When the bottle hits the ground and breaks, it creates an oil puddle at the impact site. Any vehicle that enters the puddle loses control.
  • Mini Fire Extinguisher Vision Trap: When the mini fire extinguisher vision trap item is used, it throws a small fire extinguisher behind the vehicle. Upon impact with the ground, the extinguisher explodes, releasing gas that obstructs vision. If a vehicle is nearby or directly hits the trap, there is a chance that the vehicle will explode as well!

 


All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

products.descriptionHtml:
🎤🎼 Live realistic recording, producer, placement studio performance. 

  • Easy, understandable config file. Just enter coordinate and job name and it can be activated and you can create more than one usable studio.
  • You can access the exports, downloaded beats or processes taken from the computer via Link in real life.
  • You can make people in the studio listen to your songs, exports or music live and make comments about it.
  • You can download beats not exceeding 5 minutes by YouTube. By transferring these beats to the W Studio programme, you can make some edits and record over them. 
  • Recordings, exports or downloaded beats can be listened to by users in the studio area!
  • Some features offered by the W Studio programme: Vocal mix, Export Track, Envolope Sound, Drag & Drop Track, Changeable Track position and more!



Some Information: 

  • The script is protected by Keymaster Escrow. The only open files are Config, ConfigServer and Language files.
  • The script works with NodeJS and some libraries ( Check at the bottom for support of the OS you are using ).
  • The PolyZone system is used by Ox_lib. In addition, ox_target or qb-target must be used for interaction.
  • ESX supports QBCore and Qbox. It works together with Job.
  • At the moment, the records are taken by the person on the computer. If the computer is being used by another person, it will mean that the other user cannot open the computer.


Resmon values:

Client side: 0.00 out of working. In working 0.01

Server side: Always 0.00.



Don't forget to check the Documentation page for development and more detailed content!

products.descriptionHtml:
There are currently 15 Job and will be completed by 20.

In this system with Multiplayer and Props, professions will now be more different and fun together!

DON'T FORGET TO REVIEW +20 ILLEGAL JOBPACK


🍕Pizza Delivery [ SOLO ]:

  • After you get the pizza job, remove the vehicle from the menu and then take an order from a pizza shop and deliver it.  
  • Client side when not making a delivery: 0.00, Client side when making a delivery: 0.00 ~ 0.03


🗞 Newspapar Delivery [ SOLO ]:

  • After you've removed the vehicle, you'll start delivering newsletters to houses, starting with the Mirror House.
  • Client side when not making a delivery: 0.00, Client side when making a delivery: 0.00 ~ 0.03


🌭 Mobile Hotdog [ SOLO ]:

  • After you get the hotdog stand, stop anywhere you want and sell the locals the food/drinks they want. (Only Locals NPC)
  • Client-side resmon value when the stand is removed and not interacted with: 0.00. 0.09 when the stand is moved, 0.02 ~ 0.04 when it is opened for sale to the client.


👷🏻 Forklifter [ SOLO ]:

  • You select a load job from the list, then load the pallets onto the trailer.
  • When there is no operation in the job on the client side, 0.00. After a loading is selected, 0.12 ~ 0.14 around the trailer, pallet (Since more than one marker is used)


🧑🏻‍🌾 Gardener [ SOLO ]:

  • When you want to get a vehicle, if there is a garden that is available and needs to be cleaned, it will direct you there. You will carry out this cleaning with rakes and lawnmowers.
  • While the client-side script is out of use, 0.00 is in use. When you approach the garden after receiving a job, it uses 0.05 ~ 0.08


🚛 Trucker [ SOLO ]:

  • After selecting a delivery from the list, you can pick up the trailer and deliver it, or you can deliver the trailer directly to the site.
  • When the client-side script is out of use, it uses 0.00. After receiving a job, it zooms to the trailer and uses 0.05 in the first connection and delivery part. 


🚧 Roadhelper [ SOLO ]:

  • After you pick up your car, you will receive calls for help between certain minutes and you will go to help the city vehicles (Refueling, Scrap Vehicle towing and Tyre change).
  • Client side uses 0.01 when not in use. When you receive a call, it will use maximum 0.07.


🚌 Bus Driver [ SOLO ]:

  • After selecting a city/non-city bus line, you can start working.
  • It uses 0.00 when the client side is not in use. When you select a line and start working, it uses 0.03 ~ 0.04.


💎 Metal Detectorist [ SOLO ]:

  • Earn money by searching for valuables with a detector.
  • Client-side will use 0.00 when not in use, 0.02 if you are searching the area with a detector.


🚒 Fire Department [ MULTIPLAYER / SOLO ]:

  • You can set up a group or a vehicle, then fire calls will come within certain minutes and the team/solo will intervene.
  • 0.01 when the client side is out of use. 0.07 when responding to a fire.


🫎 Hunting [ MULTIPLAYER / SOLO ]:

  • You can set up a group or take a vehicle alone and hunt in the hunting areas.
  • 0.01 when the client side is not in use. 0.01 ~ 0.02 when entering an area in use and hunting.


🧰 Project Car [ MULTIPLAYER / SOLO ]:

  • Select the project tools in the list and complete the tool in group/solo and earn money
  • 0.01 when the client side is not in use, 0.10~0.11 when in use and driving.


🤿 Diver [ MULTIPLAYER / SOLO ]:

  • The aim of this mission is to collect the creatures/objects under the water in Multiplayer/Solo way.
  • 0.00 when the client side is not in use, 0.00~0.05 when in use and driving.


🌾 Farmer [ MULTIPLAYER / SOLO ]:

  • Collect the wheat in the fields by yourself or with your friends and deliver the bales to the centre.
  • 0.00 when the client side is not in use, 0.04~0.07 when in use and driving.


👨‍🔧 Electrician [ MULTIPLAYER / SOLO ]:

  • Choose a maintenance topic from the list and solve electrical problems such as power poles, transformers and electrical boxes with your friend or alone
  • 0.00 by default when receiving a task, 0.05 when approaching the Operation zone, 0.12 ~ 0.15 when managing the Agent's Bucket, and 0.05 when just sitting on the seat in the vehicle


🔮Content coming with the update

Our goal is to complete the profession package to 20 professions with updates. On the other hand, bugs, bugs, and problems that may arise will be corrected over time according to feedback, and multiplayer professions will continue to come.

  • Unknown Job ( 16/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 17/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 18/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 19/20 )
  • Unknown Job ( 20/20 )

Note: The server side of the script is a combination of all job. To give a range, it varies depending on the number of uses and users. As much as possible, unnecessary loops, code usage has been avoided and the player has tried to prevent things like cheating with more than one condition in money and item transactions. You cannot see an absurd use of resmon.


Don't forget to check the Documentation page for development and more detailed content!

When there is no operation in the job on the client side, 0.00. After a loading is selected, 0.12 ~ 0.14 around the trailer, pallet (Since more than one marker is used)
When you want to get a vehicle, if there is a garden that is available and needs to be cleaned, it will direct you there. You will carry out this cleaning with rakes and lawnmowers.
While the client-side script is out of use, 0.00 is in use. When you approach the garden after receiving a job, it uses 0.05 ~ 0.08
After selecting a delivery from the list, you can pick up the trailer and deliver it, or you can deliver the trailer directly to the site.
When the client-side script is out of use, it uses 0.00. After receiving a job, it zooms to the trailer and uses 0.05 in the first connection and delivery part.
After you pick up your car, you will receive calls for help between certain minutes and you will go to help the city vehicles (Refueling, Scrap Vehicle towing and Tyre change).
Client side uses 0.01 when not in use. When you receive a call, it will use maximum 0.07.
After selecting a city/non-city bus line, you can start working.
It uses 0.00 when the client side is not in use. When you select a line and start working, it uses 0.03 ~ 0.04.
Earn money by searching for valuables with a detector.
Client-side will use 0.00 when not in use, 0.02 if you are searching the area with a detector.
You can set up a group or a vehicle, then fire calls will come within certain minutes and the team/solo will intervene.
0.01 when the client side is out of use. 0.07 when responding to a fire.
You can set up a group or take a vehicle alone and hunt in the hunting areas.
0.01 when the client side is not in use. 0.01 ~ 0.02 when entering an area in use and hunting.
Select the project tools in the list and complete the tool in group/solo and earn money
0.01 when the client side is not in use, 0.10~0.11 when in use and driving.
The aim of this mission is to collect the creatures/objects under the water in Multiplayer/Solo way.
0.00 when the client side is not in use, 0.00~0.05 when in use and driving.
Collect the wheat in the fields by yourself or with your friends and deliver the bales to the centre.
0.00 when the client side is not in use, 0.04~0.07 when in use and driving.
Choose a maintenance topic from the list and solve electrical problems such as power poles, transformers and electrical boxes with your friend or alone
0.00 by default when receiving a task, 0.05 when approaching the Operation zone, 0.12 ~ 0.15 when managing the Agent's Bucket, and 0.05 when just sitting on the seat in the vehicle

products.descriptionHtml:
ADVANCED VEHICLESHOP + 3D PRICE TEXT Escrow

s4-vehicleshop gives you an amazing experience, you can think of it as a package rather than a vehicleshop. It comes with extra scripts such as 3D-Text Scripts, Props and Maps. 



Here are the benefits that s4-vehicleshop will bring to your server;

  • Create and customise multiple galleries
  •  Job assignment for galleries 
  •  Impressive and clean design
  •  Test Drive, Colour change and Show Room Feature
  •  Vehicle price with 3D Text
  •  Impressive and Futuristic background map
  •  Extra camera light adjustment
  •  Adjustable vehicle features



All features and more can be found in the preview video.

More information for system (Please read before buy) :  

  • This system is a standalone system, if you want to adapt it to other scripts you will have to do it yourself!

  • There is no extra feature other than the features mentioned.  It is as you see in the video and there are no extras. It cannot be returned for any reason, such as if you think the system is different after purchase.

  • Even if you buy the script open source, the required ‘s4-props, s4-text3d, qua_critical_char’ scripts are delivered ESCROWED! These are map files and requirement files do not support customisation!

products.descriptionHtml:
This script its a STANDALONE no need a framework!

Preview: https://youtu.be/VaHuGFRuR2M?si=lrRHq03kWFKg8dcx


This script allows you to create regions on the map. For example, an area you specify as permanently snowy and permanently night. 

  • Sync game time to real time We have set this time as Los Angeles city. You can set this setting for other cities and time zones via config.
  • Time and Weather adjustable regions on the map
  • Create a region with the region creation tool /area_tool
  • Chilling and sweating properties Using this feature is a bit complicated, you will need to define clothes and weather conditions in the config. We can't do this out-of-the-box because Each server's outfit package is not fixed and outfit numbers may vary. You can turn this feature off if you don't want it.
  • Freeze Time, FreezeWeather & Blackout Features
  • Clean UI

It does not work with other weather or time sync scripts and creates incompatibility. The script ui is opened with the /time command. If it doesn't open, make sure the script name is "0r-easytime"! If you want to open a support ticket, open it under the category "s4".

products.excerpt: MANAGEABLE AND HIGHLY DETAILED MOTEL SYSTEM PREVIEW FEATURES The codes of the file named "0r_motels" sold in this package are clear. And it is accessible and fixable. Multiple room
products.descriptionHtml:
MANAGEABLE AND HIGHLY DETAILED MOTEL  SYSTEM

PREVIEW



FEATURES

The codes of the file named "0r_motels" sold in this package are clear. And it is accessible and fixable.

Multiple room types are available.

The Server Owner can create a Hotel or Apartment wherever and however he wishes.

You can add garages to motels. There is a right to park 1 car per room.

Players can rent a room for as long as they want. The rental agreement is terminated when the room rental period is exceeded.

Players can extend their current rental period.

Players can write a review about the rooms they rent and rate them by giving stars.

The Motel or Apartment owner has a boss menu. And it can do anything from this menu. (Not as much as admin)

Two types of rooms can be created: with teleport or with MLO.)

Players can open motel rooms via lockpick.

Players can give each other room keys or take them back.

Automatic and manual payment options are available for billing.

In Motel, players can increase their stash weight in exchange for money as much as the server owner allows.

Metadata System is available. You can assign room keys to a unique item.

Players can change the wall colors of their Double Plus type rooms.

The owner of the motel or apartment can change the garage colors of the motel.

Players can shower in motel rooms.

The motel owner may discount room rates.



APARTMENT SYSTEM

The Config.Apartment option in the script only works with esx_multicharacter and qb-multicharacter. If you are using a different multicharacter, the documentation includes instructions on what to do. The responsibility in this matter belongs to you.



Supported Inventories

qb-inventory

ox_inventory

qs-inventory

ps-inventory

lj-inventory

ls-inventory

origen_inventory

core_inventory

and Custom Inventory (not esx default inventory)



0R Lib

0r_lib is required for the script to run. 0r_lib is sent to your keymaster account with FiveM Escrow support for free with your purchase.

products.descriptionHtml:

Realistic collision script, you can add collision points on as many vehicles as you want. When you collide, the tires can burst or pop off depending on the speed set in the config. Park sensor feature for any vehicle. 

  • High Configuration feature. 
  • Park sensor feature can be enabled or disabled. 
  • You can restrict specific vehicles or vehicle types. 
  • Enable Test mode and add new Raycast lines.
  • Set how long the vehicle and how much damage it will take. 
  • You can enable the motor to stop after the vehicle has taken a crash from the config. 
  • Set the time for the motor to restart from the config. 
  • Configure the placement of the park sensor (by region). 
  • Change what the vehicle will take damage from and what it won't (no enttiy, ped's, vehicle's, object's). 
  • Set the minimum collision speed. 
  • Change the next crash detection time. 
  • Set which vehicle types should have the park sensor (example: Compacts, sports, sedan). 
  •  Set what speed the tires will burst or pop off at.

products.excerpt: previewhttps://youtu.be/7jEiUfROmPEscript-open5305269script-escrow5305267 -UI features: Adaptive design for varying aspect ratios and resolutions. When a new squad gets created, de
products.descriptionHtml:
previewhttps://youtu.be/7jEiUfROmPE
script-open5305269
script-escrow5305267

-UI features: Adaptive design for varying aspect ratios and resolutions. When a new squad gets created, deleted or when a player joins values will change real-time.  

-General features:

 The resource consumption for both client and server is 0.00ms.

 After joining a squad the client resource consumption will remain 0.00ms.

 During join and leave activities, resource consumption will spike to 0.01ms on server side.(this spike is temporary and afterwards it'll go down)

 Maximum allowed player count for a squad can be changed through config.lua.

-Squad features: 

Every squad has its own unique icon/logo. 

Squads can be made private or public 

The menu will change to squad specific menu after joining one or creating.  

After rallying the squad a in-game overlay will pop up on top left side of the screen.(Which shows the health, armor, name and the picture of members) 

Squad leader can send invites to available players via "/invite [id]" command, these invites will appear on the recipients menu.(Invites will expire after 1 minute) 

Squad leader can kick members from squad. 

If squad leader leaves the squad, leadership will be given to a random member. 

If there's only one member in the squad and that member leaves, the squad will automatically be disbanded. 

Squad members can see each other on the map.  

Squad members will see health, armor values and names on top of their squad mates.

 Friendly fire is off within the squad.

Players who get dismissed from their squad will immediately lose their status as a squad member, thus removing them from minimap and hiding their health/armor values. 

Note: If you use steam_webApiKey, each player's own steam profile photo will appear in the squad, but if you don't use steam_webApiKey, every player's profile photo in the squad will be the same.
